The Whole Ten Yards (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,323,969Details
International Box Office $10,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $26,323,969
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,685,381 (41.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.44 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,654 opening theaters/2,654 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $31,438,750

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 9th, 2004 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: July 8th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: July 27th, 2004 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content, some violence and language
Running Time: 98 minutes
Franchise: Whole Nine Yards
Plot point: Death of a Son or Daughter, Dentist, Faked Death, Hitmen, Kidnap, Mafia, Pregnant Women, Relationships Gone Wrong, Revenge, Romance
Social setting: Organized Crime
Subgenre: Crime Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, Hungarian, Hebrew
